Name: Hosyond UART
Notes: Pins: 5V,GND,UART_TX,UART_RX. Footprint suggestion must be changed if connector is JST-GH/JST-SH 1.25mm.

Name: Hosyond I2C
Notes: Pins: 3V3,GND,I2C_SCL,I2C_SDA. Verify exact JST family before layout.

Name: Hosyond GPIO
Notes: Pins: GPIO2,GPIO3,GPIO14,GPIO21. GPIO14/21 now rail enables.

Name: Left Gimbal
Notes: Pins: GND,L_X,3V3,GND,L_Y,3V3.

Name: Right Gimbal
Notes: Pins: GND,R_X,3V3,GND,R_Y,3V3.

Name: ELRS Module
Notes: Pins: 5V_SW,GND,RX,TX. Use footprint matching actual ELRS socket/header.

Name: USB-C Breakout
Notes: Pins: VBUS,GND,CC1,D-,D+,CC2. Breakout handles CC resistors.

Name: Battery Input/Pass-through
Notes: Protected 1S LiPo only. Verify actual battery/Hosyond connector.

Name: 3V3 I2C Power Switch Output Side
Notes: Other side of 3.3V switch module. Pins should carry 3V3_SW/GND where the Pololu board exposes switched VOUT/GND; unused pads can be NC.

Name: 5V ELRS Power Switch Output Side
Notes: Other side of 5V switch module. Pins should carry 5V_SW/GND where the Pololu board exposes switched VOUT/GND; unused pads can be NC.

Name: Power Button
Notes: Pins: GPIO2 sense, GPIO3 reference. Direct ESP32 connection for deep-sleep wake.

Name: Power Button LED
Notes: LED+ from PCF8575 P05 through resistor if needed; LED- to GND.

Name: Aux Analog A0/A1 Header
Notes: Pins: GND,A0_B,3V3,GND,A1_B,3V3.

Name: 5-way D-pad
Notes: Pins: SELECT,D,C,B,A,VCC,GND. Map to PCF P00-P04.

Name: Hosyond USB Pads/Header
Notes: Pins: VBUS,GND,D-,D+. Use if breaking USB out through carrier.

Name: Hosyond Battery Pads/Header
Notes: Pins: BAT+,BAT-. Do not connect to USB VBUS directly.

Name: Reserved Spare Header
Notes: Optional spare/test header if wanted.

Name: Power LED Ring
Notes: LED+ from PCF P05, LED- to GND.

Name: PCF Expansion A
Notes: Pins: PCF P06,P07,P08,P09.

Name: PCF Expansion B
Notes: Pins: PCF P10,P11,P12,P13.

Name: PCF Expansion C
Notes: Pins: PCF P14,P15,P16,P17.

Name: PCF8575 I2C Bus
Notes: Pins: 3V3_SW,GND,I2C_SCL,I2C_SDA for the PCF8575 module.

Name: Aux Analog A2/A3 Header
Notes: Pins: GND,A2_B,3V3,GND,A3_B,3V3.

Name: 3V3 I2C Power Switch Control/Input Side
Notes: One side of 3.3V switch module: VIN,VIN,GND,GND,ON,OFF,CTRL based on current schematic.

Name: 5V ELRS Power Switch Control/Input Side
Notes: One side of 5V switch module: VIN,VIN,GND,GND,ON,OFF,CTRL based on current schematic.

Name: ADS1115 A Module
Notes: Primary gimbal ADC: VCC,GND,SCL,SDA,ADDR,ALRT,A0,A1,A2,A3.

Name: ADS1115 B Module
Notes: Future aux ADC. Must set ADDR to non-0x48.

Name: PCF8575 Module Side A
Notes: One side of PCF8575 module: 3V3_SW,GND,P00-P08.

Name: PCF8575 Module Side B
Notes: Other side of PCF8575 module: 3V3_SW,GND,P17-P09 or physical order as installed.

Name: 5V Test Pad
Notes: Probe Hosyond 5V rail.

Name: 3V3 Test Pad
Notes: Probe Hosyond 3.3V rail.

Name: GND Test Pad
Notes: Probe common ground.

Name: SDA Test Pad
Notes: Probe I2C SDA.

Name: SCL Test Pad
Notes: Probe I2C SCL.

Name: UART TX Test Pad
Notes: Probe Hosyond UART TX.

Name: UART RX Test Pad
Notes: Probe Hosyond UART RX.
